rules.rule_text:
rule Hangover_Slidewin
{
	meta:
		author = "Alienvault Labs"
		reference = "https://www.alienvault.com/blogs/labs-research/microsoft-office-zeroday-used-to-attack-pakistani-targets"

	strings:
		$a1 = "[NumLock]"
		$a2 = "[ScrlLock]"
		$a3 = "[LtCtrl]"
		$a4 = "[RtCtrl]"
		$a5 = "[LtAlt]"
		$a6 = "[RtAlt]"
		$a7 = "[HomePage]"
		$a8 = "[MuteOn/Off]"
		$a9 = "[VolDn]"
		$a10 = "[VolUp]"
		$a11 = "[Play/Pause]"
		$a12 = "[MailBox]"
		$a14 = "[Calc]"
		$a15 = "[Unknown]"

	condition:
		all of them
}
